AccoRevit.Addin

Class AnnotationConfigurationEditorViewModel

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.ModelViews
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

View model for editing an annotation configuration XML file that defines tag family, type, placement, and filtering rules.

public class AnnotationConfigurationEditorViewModel : ViewModelBase, INotifyPropertyChanged, IViewModel

object

Remarks

Provides a grid-backed collection of AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel items with search and category/tag-type filtering via ItemsView.

Integrates with services that discover tag families on disk, query available family types from .rfa files, and enumerate fabrication service types from the active Revit document.

Tracks unsaved changes using IsDirty and suppresses dirty tracking during bulk load operations.

Constructors

AnnotationConfigurationEditorViewModel(string)

Initializes a new editor view model and optionally loads an initial XML configuration file.

public AnnotationConfigurationEditorViewModel(string initialXmlPath = null)

Parameters

initialXmlPath string

Optional path to an existing XML configuration file to load on startup. If not provided, the editor starts empty.

Remarks

On construction, this view model:

  • Creates required services and initializes ItemsView sorting and filtering.
  • Wires collection/item change tracking for dirty state.
  • Loads family names and service types for picklists.
  • Loads the file at initialXmlPath when provided and present on disk.

Properties

AddCommand

Command that adds a new default annotation specification item.

public RelayCommand AddCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

AvailableFamilyNames

Names of tag families discovered on disk for selection in the editor UI.

public ObservableCollection<string> AvailableFamilyNames { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

AvailableServiceTypes

Fabrication service type names discovered from the active document's fabrication configuration.

public ObservableCollection<string> AvailableServiceTypes { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

BrowseXmlCommand

Command that allows the user to browse and select an XML file to load.

public RelayCommand BrowseXmlCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

CanEditSelected

Gets a value indicating whether there is a selected item that can be edited.

public bool CanEditSelected { get; }

Property Value

bool

CategoryFilterOptions

Category filter dropdown options (includes an “All” option).

public ObservableCollection<string> CategoryFilterOptions { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

DeleteCommand

Command that deletes the currently selected item.

public RelayCommand DeleteCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

DuplicateCommand

Command that duplicates the currently selected item.

public RelayCommand DuplicateCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

IsDirty

Gets a value indicating whether the editor has unsaved changes.

public bool IsDirty { get; }

Property Value

bool

Items

Editable collection of annotation specification items.

public ObservableCollection<AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel> Items { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel>

ItemsView

Filterable/sortable view over Items used by the UI.

public ICollectionView ItemsView { get; }

Property Value

ICollectionView

KnownCategories

Known categories, seeded with common values and augmented from loaded items.

public ObservableCollection<string> KnownCategories { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

KnownPlacementPositions

Set of placement position values available for selection, seeded with known values and augmented from loaded items.

public ObservableCollection<string> KnownPlacementPositions { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

KnownTagTypes

Known tag types, seeded with common values and augmented from loaded items.

public ObservableCollection<string> KnownTagTypes { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

LoadCommand

Command that loads the XML file at XmlFilePath into Items.

public RelayCommand LoadCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

LoadFamilyTypesCommand

Command that loads available family types for the currently SelectedItem by opening the selected family file.

public RelayCommand LoadFamilyTypesCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

SaveCommand

Command that saves the current Items back to XmlFilePath.

public RelayCommand SaveCommand { get; }

Property Value

RelayCommand

SearchText

Free-text search term used by ItemsView filtering.

public string SearchText { get; set; }

Property Value

string

SelectedCategoryFilter

Currently selected category filter value (or “All”).

public string SelectedCategoryFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

string

SelectedItem

The currently selected item in the editor.

public AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel SelectedItem { get; set; }

Property Value

AnnotationSpecificationItemViewModel

Remarks

Updating this value refreshes dependent properties and command CanExecute states.

SelectedTagTypeFilter

Currently selected tag type filter value (or “All”).

public string SelectedTagTypeFilter { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TagTypeFilterOptions

Tag-type filter dropdown options (includes an “All” option).

public ObservableCollection<string> TagTypeFilterOptions { get; }

Property Value

ObservableCollection<string>

XmlFilePath

Path to the currently loaded XML configuration file.

public string XmlFilePath { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Remarks

Updating this value invalidates command CanExecute states.
